name: The Unicorn Princess
short_description: Explore the world on horseback and help the inhabitants of your village. Befriend Unica the unicorn and try to save the Dream World by completing all your missions!
detailed_description:
From your village, the Dream World is just a step away!
Befriend Unica the unicorn while exploring the real world and the world of dreams.
You're the only one who can help Unica save her world!

  • 15 different missions between two worlds
  • Many options to customise your character and horse
  • An open world to explore on the back of one of six horses available

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Portuguese - Brazil, Danish, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Russian, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
